text.title: Ideation Methods: SCAMPER, Mind Mapping, Starbursting Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: SCAMPER worksheet has 'Substitute' and 'Combine' filled, rest empty.
antipattern.root-cause: Operator stopped at first interesting ideas.
antipattern.fix: Enforce all 7 lenses at validation; reject worksheets missing any.

antipattern.symptom: Mind Map is a star: 8 children of central node, no grandchildren.
antipattern.root-cause: Operator listed concepts, didn't develop them.
antipattern.fix: Require min depth 3 + 4 nodes per parent at level 2.

antipattern.symptom: Starbursting matrix has 5+ Who/What/How but only 1 Why.
antipattern.root-cause: Why feels speculative; operator avoided it.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥3 questions per W/H type; Why often produces the highest-value questions.

antipattern.symptom: Output stored as 'ideas: [1,2,3,...]' bypassing worksheet structure.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects output without method-specific structure.
